files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches:
+      - main
+  pull_request:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    name: Lint, Test, Type Check, Build
+    runs-on: macos-14
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Run lint
+        run: bun run lint
+
+      - name: Check formatting
+        run: bun run format:check
+
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: bun test
+
+      - name: TypeScript checks
+        run: bun run typecheck
+
+      - name: Build application
+        run: bun run build

@@ -21,7 +21,8 @@
     "lint": "oxlint .",
     "format": "prettier --write .",
     "format:check": "prettier --check .",
-    "check": "bun run lint && bun run format:check"
+    "check": "bun run lint && bun run format:check",
+    "typecheck": "bun run --workspaces typecheck"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
     "@ianvs/prettier-plugin-sort-imports": "^4.7.0",
@@ -30,7 +31,8 @@
     "oxlint": "^1.22.0",
     "prettier": "^3.6.2",
     "prettier-plugin-tailwindcss": "^0.6.14",
-    "unenv": "^1.10.0"
+    "unenv": "^1.10.0",
+    "typescript": "^5.6.2"
   },
   "prettier": {
     "printWidth": 120,

@@ -13,7 +13,8 @@
     "db:migrate:local": "wrangler d1 migrations apply vibeinsights --local",
     "db:migrate:remote": "wrangler d1 migrations apply vibeinsights --remote",
     "db:studio": "DB_LOCAL_PATH=$(find .wrangler/state/v3/d1/miniflare-D1DatabaseObject -type f -name '*.sqlite' -print -quit 2>/dev/null) drizzle-kit studio --port 4983",
-    "db:reset": "rm -rf .wrangler/state && bun run db:setup"
+    "db:reset": "rm -rf .wrangler/state && bun run db:setup",
+    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json"
   },
   "dependencies": {
     "@vibeinsights/shared": "workspace:*",
